answer: On the third turn, the system checks 20 positions (blocks 35 through 16) and finds nothing; the previous cache entry at block 15 is outside the lookback window, so there is no cache hit.

Claude Opus 4 and Claude Opus 4.1 have the highest cost difference between their base input tokens ($15 / MTok) and cache hits ($1.50 / MTok), with a numerical difference of $13.50 per million tokens.
Enabling web search modifies the system prompt, which invalidates the system and messages cache, but the tools cache remains valid.
